response.justification: Well over the required experience bar with strong, recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that directly matches an unusual requirement of this role. A software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and cloud/Kubernetes exposure round out the profile. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and testing framework specifics (Vitest/Playwright) not evidenced, though the testing culture is clearly strong.
strengths: Deep, recent TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack experience at product companies
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, a rare direct match
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated
Vitest/Playwright not evidenced, though broader testing expertise is strong
